programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego milagrosamente logra que le den un crédito bancario, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de una muerte reciente dentro del edificio para su beneficio económico.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego emprende en un nuevo negocio con pulgas, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan son tomados como rehenes por unos crimínales en un asalto al banco.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego lleva a Jonathan al museo de antropología por encargo de su escuela y se da cuenta que un personaje del Calendario Azteca se parece mucho a él.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En este episodio La familia del barrio muestra una divertida parodia a las Sitcoms mas populares, desde la óptica del prototipo de familia mexicana disfuncional.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una aparición religiosa se manifiesta en el baño del departamento y poco tardan el noruego y el abuelo en encontrarle una ventaja a esta situación.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en las encantadoras melodías que inspiran dulces sueños y sonrisas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels para un baño de burbujas lleno de diversión, donde hacen de cuenta que bañarse es divertido, pero con burbujas es la bonanza de la diversión.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un viaje lleno de diversión en el que aprenderás a compartir, lo que potenciará la empatía y el sentimiento de cuidado hacia los demás.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus fiestas de juegos, donde descubren la alegría de ayudar y marcar la diferencia, demostrando que incluso los actos de bondad más pequeños pueden tener un gran impacto.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un viaje especial a través de un día lleno de exploración y aprendizaje. Desde ordenar la casa hasta recordar su infancia, cada momento trae nuevos descubrimientos.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de diversión, aprendizaje y emoción. Desde la rutina matutina hasta el recreo en la escuela, pasando por el cuidado de los hermanitos y canciones deportivas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a los Little Angels en un día lleno de aventuras! Desde armar un puesto de limonadas hasta convertirse en princesas, explorar con la araña Itsy Bitsy y disfrutar de fiestas en pijama, ¡cada momento es mágico!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en un día lleno de emoción y asombro. Desde aprender el baile de Baby Shark hasta explorar la magia de mezclar colores, jugar y descubrir sorpresas, ¡es un viaje de diversión y descubrimiento que te dejará sonriendo!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Explora la seguridad con Little Angel! Desde el patio de recreo hasta la los primeros auxilios, pasando por la hora de la siesta y el cuidado de la piel. Será un viaje lleno de diversión para mantenerte a salvo.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en una emocionante aventura de aprendizaje y exploración. Desde descubrir sabores hasta dominar movimientos de karate, cada aventura está llena de risas, descubrimientos y valiosas lecciones que inspiran la curiosidad.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a los Little Angels en sus tiernos viajes. Desde el amor entre hermanos hasta la perseverancia, pasando por la alegría de los cumpleaños, la diversión en el salón y la salud, ¡todo un tesoro de lecciones envueltas en amor y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel para divertirte a salvo. Desde "No hables con extraños" hasta "A salvo en la playa", aprende lecciones importantes mientras disfrutas del parque, de los días de playa y las melodías pegadizas.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en un día lleno de emociones con Little Angel! Desde campamentos y aventuras piratas hasta visitas al zoológico, competencias de castillos de arena, aventuras heladas y la alegría navideña, ¡cada aventura es un tesoro de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras! Desde tomar turnos hasta descubrir el cuerpo, las rutinas antes de dormir, superar enfermedades, la seguridad en la nieve y la diversión en Londres, ¡cada momento trae alegría y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día de aventuras con Little Angel! Desde aprender a comer sano hasta ordenar, pasando por la construcción, la seguridad a la hora de comer, consejos para cuidar niños y trucos de astucia, ¡es un viaje de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel en un día de diversión y aprendizaje! Desde sorpresas hasta bailar, clases de ballet, higiene dental, tareas domésticas, cuidado del estómago y observar estrellas, ¡es una aventura de risas y descubrimientos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en una aventura mágica! Desde momentos tranquilos hasta monos juguetones, cuentos de hadas, búsquedas de huevos de Pascua, parques de diversiones, cumpleaños y paciencia, ¡es un día de maravillas y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Acompaña a Little Angel en emocionantes aventuras de aprendizaje! Desde medirse hasta divertirse en la granja, la construcción de formas, revisiones oculares, animales del mundo y sorprender a mamá y papá, ¡es un día de descubrimientos y alegría!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus aventuras de juego. Desde la imitación hasta los sustos a la hora de dormir, lavarse las manos, la paciencia, la búsqueda de juguetes, las ovejas sucias y el alegre cucú, ¡es un día de risas y juegos!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a la aventura de aprendizaje de Little Angel! Desde explorar profesiones hasta comprender los sentidos, la alimentación sana, la anatomía y las visitas al médico, ¡cada paso es un descubrimiento de conocimiento y diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Embárcate en un día lleno de alegría junto a Little Angel y sus amigos! Desde expresar su amor por mamá hasta aventuras con juguetes, ¡únete a este viaje lleno de diversión!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en la diversión veraniega con Little Angel! Desde compartir en el parque hasta emocionantes visitas al parque acuático, nadar, bailar, acampar, días de playa y aventuras junto al lago, ¡es un verano lleno de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para divertirte al aire libre! Desde payasadas en el patio hasta patinaje, familias de dedos, seguridad en la cama, concientización sobre accidentes y faltar a clase, ¡un día de juegos y seguridad!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Únete a Little Angel para un día de diversión! Desde cantar con globos hasta imitar sonidos de animales, canciones infantiles, partes del cuerpo, citas con el abuelo, sueños de dinosaurios y confiar en el médico, ¡es un día de risas y aprendizaje!

programme.desc: Little Baby Bum es un espectáculo divertido y educativo para niños que presenta canciones infantiles, clásicas y nuevas; amado por los bebés, y sus padres en todo el mundo.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: Nick is in pursuit of finding out how to build a drawbridge. In Spansylvania, they meet a dragon who's in pursuit of them - and along the way they find out that some materials are better suited for bridges than others.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...
programme.desc: When Sally destroys Nick's model of a mountain, the Cat takes them to meet Sara of Serendip, an inventor who helps them understand that you can make new discoveries through your mistakes.

programme.title: The Cat In The Hat Knows A Lot About...

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Sleeping Lion, a statue made of solid gold, is being transported to a museum by a specially armored, airtight car. Lupin steals the armored car together with the statue and nearly asphyxiated Inspector Zenigata inside.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin manages to steal crime boss Mulligan's precious jewels, only have them stolen from him by Fujiko! Mulligan, unaware that Fujiko has his jewels, hires a skilled gunman named Hangman to take them back from Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has been put on auction at the Wanted Club and Dr. Mad places the winning bid. Dr. Mad also purchases Fujiko and Jigen from the auctions. The three are abandoned on a deserted island with killer cyborgs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has his eyes on the royal family's Imperial State Crown, but thanks to Scotland Yard's Inspector Dover, stealing it won't be easy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin announces he's going to steal the betting takes at the Kentucky Derby, but the heist fails. However, it's all part of the plan. Lupin's main target is really the Metropolitan Bank's underground vault.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After several divorces and a couple of deceased husbands, Jacqueline has amassed a fortune and a collection of impressive jewels. In a twist of fate, Lupin and Jacqueline become close... Too close for Jigen and Goemon's comfort…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An illicit auction selling smuggled treasures is taking place. Lupin targets the auction. In the process, Lupin discovers the auctioneer is Cornelia, the woman he once loved who died saving his life…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is reunited with Cornelia, a woman who died by her father's hands to save Lupin's life. However, Cornelia's memories of Lupin have been erased. Her father is Dr. Zel, a Nazi who has succeeded in resurrecting corpses and controlling them.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko discovers that the Holy Scripture for Immortality is hidden within the jungles of Thailand. However, Emmanuelle Poirot, a cold-hearted beauty, is after them too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Phantoma Mark III, grandson of the mysterious master thief and disguise artist Phantoma, who terrorized Europe during his heyday, is plotting to take over the world…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The aging Inspector Hanshichi Mikawa, who failed to capture Lupin 10 years ago, is viewed as a nuisance by his peers at the downtown police station. Lupin has announced he'll be stealing the golden Kannon statuette.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang have stolen the "36 Views of Mt. Fuji," a famous series of 46 woodblock prints, from the exhibition hall. However, a gang calling itself the Shiranami Five challenges Lupin head-on by stealing one of the prints from him.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Goemon, siding with the Shiranami Five, challenges Lupin to a one-on-one duel. While Goemon keeps Lupin busy, the Shiranami Five steals the 36 Views, but one of its members, Kikuko Benten, betrays her gang and escapes with the loot.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: On a wild whim, Inspector Zenigata swipes a throwing coin owned by his great Edo-era ancestor, Heiji Zenigata while he's viewing the inside of an incredible new safe protected by Professor Hunter's super computer.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are after the Aurora Droplet, a diamond adorning a prima ballerina's tiara. During the heist, Jigen is wounded and in a twist of fate, is saved by Monica, the prima ballerina.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: After shaking off Inspector Zenigata's pursuit, Lupin is stopped by a monstrously huge Fujiko on his way home! The giant Fujiko turns out to be an illusion created by Madame X. Lupin learns Madame X's hobby is collecting famous people.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Bandit leader Basara is determined to sniff out the location of the diamonds Lupin has hidden somewhere in India. Armed with his sinister invention, the Suicide Ray Gun, he tries to make Lupin talk, even trying his luck with a fake Fujiko.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Trouble is all but guaranteed when a crime boss and an arms merchant join hands. The two set their eyes on Goemen's sword, which can split a tank in half! After hiring Fujiko to steal it, they transform the sword into an invincible flying weapon of war.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Jigen and Gomen have sent a letter saying they are being held captive in a small but terrifying village. Lupin arrives in the village to rescue them, but Jigen and Goemon are acting oddly.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Don Kecchi, the wealthiest man in America, is terminally ill and has announced that he's donating his entire fortune to charity. However, Lupin steals Kecchi's money and shoots Fujiko right in front of Inspector Zenigata!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Margaret Tiffany, the owner of Tiffany's and a TV anchor, hires Lupin and his gang to rob her jewelry store on live TV. Initially, Lupin refuses, but ends up having to go through with it thanks to Fujiko's wild spending habits.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A princess of a small Silk Road country has been kidnapped. Lupin and his gang are persuaded to rescue Princess Yasmin in exchange for a stomach full of holy curry meant for the gods. However, the kidnapping was a trap to lure Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Here comes Beauty, the assassin hired by ICPO Headquarters to knock off Lupin! Overwhelmed by Beauty's powerful DumDum bullets, Lupin narrowly escapes with his life thanks to Jigen's quick thinking.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and his gang head to the isolated country of Kimasan, after hearing the country possesses mountains of treasure. They sneak across the border but are quickly captured by Kinkaku and Ginkaku, the giants who rule the country.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Casino Paradise is an artificial island owned and operated by Domino, a casino tycoon. Domino decides to run for President and brags that with $500 million to spend, the only way he can lose is if Lupin steals his campaign funds!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Political fixer Pomade Jaws trusts no one, not even his wife Laura. He's stored the scandalous secrets of various world leaders inside a voice-activated safe.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin, Jigen and Goemon have turned themselves in to the FBI, but it's all part of the plan. Their real goal is to break out old man Clyde Barlow, who was once known as a genius bank robber, to get his help with their heist of the National Super Bank.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a cave. Lady Elaine won't return until the no-play rule is changed. King Friday removes the ban when he realizes his fanfare cannot be played.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers walks on stilts and talks about how long it took him to learn to walk on them. Bob Dog persuades Lady Elaine Fairchilde to return to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe. Mister Rogers talks about different ways of playing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how a player piano works. Corney's latest shipment of rocking chairs has been made with half pretzel parts. Mister Rogers talks about how important it is to do things well.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to visit ice skating star Peggy Fleming, who is practicing for an ice show. They talk about how doing anything well takes a lot of practice.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make blankets. Lady Elaine convinces Corney to manufacture only rocking chairs. Mister Rogers talks about why children are sometimes punished.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how spoons are made. King Friday demands that Lady Aberlin and Robert Troll create a mountain beside the castle. Mary Alice Sherred makes music with spoons.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film about how people make towels. The Neighborhood of Make-Believe is hosting the Make-Believe Olympic Games. Lady Elaine will only agree to play if she is guaranteed to win the games.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with two pieces of wood and turns a chair into a rocking chair. Lady Aberlin and Bob Dog help Corney make rocking chairs. They are unable to stop rocking thanks to Lady Elaine's boomerang.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a robot factory. A robot talks with Lady Elaine but does not understand the term like. Daniel talks to the robot about caring. Handyman Negri tells Daniel that it's great to love others.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Brandon Margulies explains how to play a video game. Keith David shows how the machine works. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is getting ready for the Olympic games. Lady Elaine has decided to make it snow.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folk singer Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers and sings and plays a song on a harmonica. Mister Rogers has a Neighborhood board game with the different Make-Believe Neighbors.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a daycare and sees children playing. He talks about why children need to go to day care sometimes. King Friday and Queen Sarah have to leave for a few days but Prince Tuesday does not want a babysitter.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Stranded alone on the beach, Luffy tries to gather his bearings only to be confronted by some mysterious, and dangerous, local fauna! And then, he meets a little girl named Otama! Meanwhile, Zoro makes trouble for the others who are trying to blend in!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's gratitude towards Luffy knows no bounds! But the feast she cooks him exhausts her food stores completely! As she suffers from poor drinking water, her companion tells the story of the mysterious outsider she waits for - Ace!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ambushed and outgunned by a skilled bounty hunter Cidre's group, the Straw Hats rely on the Sunny's Coup de Burst to escape! But they end up stranded without cola! A nearby soda island offers a solution.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Boa Hancock square off against the Cidre Guild! These unscrupulous bounty hunters have one thing in mind - profit at any cost! When the battle looks won, Cidre gears up in a menacing power suit!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama recounts her promise to Ace while Luffy rushes her to medical attention. But just as they reach the wasteland, a familiar face comes into view! But Kaido's underlings show up too!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's temperature is going up and Luffy has no time to waste! However, Hawkins, one of Kaido's Headliners, blocks their way by showing his unique powers and skills which can harm his own men.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and Zoro have been stalled by Hawkins but their fortune looks bright as they are guided by a woman who Zoro had saved. She leads them to a teahouse and to an herbal remedy for the river poison.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama's life is saved by Otsuru at her teahouse. The proud Otama finds it hard to take more kindness. The group learns of the Okobore Town - living on the cast-offs of the officials! Then, suddenly, they were attacked by the Shogun's men!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Otama has been kidnapped by the Gifters! She is taken to a flourishing town called Bakura Town where a creepy-looking Headliner was expecting her. Luffy and Zoro rush to rescue her along with a samurai, Okiku!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Luffy, Zoro, and Okiku bounce through Bakura Town on Komachiyo's back, a sumo wrestler comes flying towards them! Interested, they go down to watch sumo but the undefeated yokozuna Urashima has been expecting Okiku there.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy challenges Urashima, the strongest yokozuna in the Land of Wano, to a sumo match! Urashima even uses illegal moves to beat Luffy at any cost! Meanwhile, Holdem tells Otama that he knows she committed a crime and he has to punish her for it.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After sending the yokozuna Urashima flying, Luffy and his clan continue their search for Bakura Town's boss to save Otama! They finally find the boss, Holdem, one of the Beast Pirates' Headliners.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Facing Holdem who is holding Otama as hostage, Luffy prepares for a fight but Okiku tries to stop him by sharing who is really ruling the region. Meanwhile, Basil Hawkins is confronted by a mysterious figure.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Taking down Holdem, Luffy rescues Otama and tries to catch up to Zoro and Okiku who stole the food treasure ship and started a mad dash to get out of the town!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: This is a story of Luffy in an alternate reality. While sailing on the sea by himself, a strange bird crashes into his small boat. He looks up to find a giant ship where a girl named Ann has been captured. It seems like the bird belongs to her.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and the others dash out of BakuraTown on the treasure ship filled with food! Luffy catches up to them bringing ahuge bucket of fresh water! Then, they distribute the food and the water to thepeople of Okobore Town who were thirsty and hungry.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy arrives at the ruins of Oden Castle following Law and finds the graves of his friends, Kin'emon and the others. As Law starts telling the already-stunned Luffy about the creepy story of Kin'emon's ghost, Luffy sees it coming towards him!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kin'emon tells Luffy and the others about how Kozuki Oden made Kuri into a peaceful region and became its Daimyo. However, he was set up by Kaido and Kurozumi Orochi and executed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Kin'emon and the others crossed through time by the power of Kozuki Toki, Momonosuke's mother, and arrived at the Land of Wano 20 years later, a totally different country before their eyes.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Ashura Doji, one of the allies Kin'emon wants to search for, has become the head of a thieves brigade and they now raid Okobore Town taking away the food that Luffy gave to the people.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The drunken Kaido flies above Okobore Town in his dragon form and threatens Shutenmaru and all the people in the town. Luffy, Law, Kin'emon, and Okiku start running towards the town to rescue them.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is kidnapped by Nietscheans and forced to play mind games for the amusement of his captors.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Two Nietzschean siblings are in a stand-off over a weapon that can eliminate higher brain functions. The crew steps in so neither can get the weapon.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr returns, having joined with the Collectors and demanding the Route of Ages from his former crewmates.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A hostage situation ensues when the crew confronts Tyr. Beka is rescued, Tyr is killed, and Trance reveals her true nature.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A wrong turn in the slipstream leads Andromeda to a prison riot. When the dust settles, they discover a prisoner missing.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda crew steps up to find out who killed a group of scientists and locate the kidnapped one.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew is hired to rescue a princess from a notorious outlaw, but it is soon revealed that she was trying to escape murder at her father's hand.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Collectors now control the Commonwealth and put the Andromeda crew on trial.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda discovers a shipment of bio-armor, with terrifying results.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: An experimental cloaking device drops Dylan in an alternate universe, where he learns how to save the Andromeda - assuming he can get back to his own reality.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets caught in a war between two ships that includes a fatal disease - one that Dylan picks up.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is tricked by Rev and kidnapped. The crew finds an "unexpected ally" in a Collector.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Abyss has infected Beka. The crew must find a way to save her.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After some of the crew is captured, Harper is forced to work on a time bridge for the Patriarch.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Brooklyn shop keepers are afraid of closing time as a killer shoots his victims while locking up their stores.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990's, New York is on edge as a killer leaves coded clues at crime scenes and declares his compulsion to choose victims by their birth signs.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A rash of young men goes missing around Chicago during the 1970s; when bodies start washing up in the river, a pattern emerges; a small piece of evidence leads police to the home of a model citizen, where his furnace puts the suspect in the hot seat.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Police find a string of murdered women in shallow graves in very remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness; after months of searching, police zero in on a local family man living a double life that no one suspects.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Numerous women are found dead by the side of the road with a unique ligature that looks like a dog collar and leash; detectives are stumped until a 17-year-old girl manages an escape from a vicious kidnapper, leading police to a serial killer.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: The I-5 corridor in California is taken over by a brazen bandit who terrorizes the highway with a blitz of assaults and murders; the only clue to the killer's identity is a specific athletic tape used to bind his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer taunts Wichita, Kan., for decades by sending brazen letters and taking credit for horrific kills; at the introduction of the computer era, the killer gets sloppy and accidentally leaves a digital clue.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Louisiana is terrorized by multiple serial killers; the Zachary Police Department discovers the key to solving their cases when a pattern emerges with personal items missing from each local victim.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer is murdering and mutilating young women along the Route 40 corridor in Delaware, but after investigators set up an undercover operation, the hunter soon becomes the hunted.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After multiple men are discovered brutally murdered, investigators determine that each victim was last seen with a handsome stranger they met in a bar.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: After a series of women in the Seattle area are found brutally murdered with their bodies posed, police realize that they might have a killer stalking the area nightclub scene who is able to charm his victims into submission.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago police investigate the murders of several women, whose bodies are discovered in abandoned buildings barefoot.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Chicago detectives believe that a serial killer is using classified ads to lure and murder his victims.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A killer crisscrosses the Midwest leaving a string of victims along the interstate, but when he realizes investigators are hot on his trail the murderer suddenly changes his mark.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A cold-blooded killer conceals his victims' bodies with trash, discarding them like garbage in the back alleyways of Los Angeles.

programme.title: Mark of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A Houston killer taunts the media and authorities as he uses homemade ligatures to murder his victims.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol clean up a small oil spill in the water near Adventure Bay. /When Adventure Bay's famous statue ends up at the bottom of the Bay, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to help Mayor Goodway bring it back!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Adventure Bay Western Days, when a herd of cows escape from a train at the railway station!/When their friend Alex decides he wants to be a member of the PAW Patrol the PUPS and Ryder let him come along for the ride.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's boat runs aground, Ryder, Zuma, Skye, and Rocky must team up to save it before it sinks!/The PAW Patrol must pick all Farmer Yumi's fruit before an early snowstorm comes! But how can Chase help?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder, Chase, and Rubble hatch a plan to help sea turtle hatchlings safely cross the road to get to the beach!/There's a beached baby whale in Adventure Bay! Can the Paw Patrol work together to reunite it with its mother?

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol rescue a lost kitty from the bay, but who will save them from all the mayhem she causes?/Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train from a rockslide!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must work quickly to fix the tracks and remove a train car at the Adventure Bay Train Station, before the next train comes./Ryder and the PAW Patrol battle the clock to fix the lighthouse.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Marshal gets a new BFF when a gosling he names "Fuzzy" takes a liking to him. /When Mayor Goodway accidentally takes off in a hot air balloon, Ryder and the Paw Patrol must make a dramatic rescue to save her and win the race!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jakes mountain./The pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay. Everyone thinks it's a "snow monster" and it's scaring the skiers away.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder gets a call from the Circus ringmaster - Ellie the baby elephant has escaped from the circus train! /Mayor Goodway's purse chicken "Chickaletta" has gone missing. Ryder and the Paw Patrol search Adventure bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new "super trike"./Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Mr. Porters van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore; Ryder and the PAW Patrol must save the day!/Katie and her cat Cali are on the chair lift when it stops leaving them above the ski hill with no way to get down!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Capt'n Turbot has decorated an old wreck as a pirate ship for a town party. When the ship mysteriously heads out to sea captained by a "ghost" Ryder and the Paw Patrol must save the ship and discover the ghost!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Santa's Sleigh crashes and the reindeer run off - Ryder and the PAW PATROL have to help Santa finish delivering presents and save Christmas!

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.desc: In Topeka, KS, Mike Sisco and Karen Harkness have invited their parents over to celebrate their upcoming wedding. Instead, the couple is found gunned down in their own bed. Whoever did it left no trace. Chris Hansen goes after the motive to the mystery.

programme.title: Killer Instinct with Chris Hansen

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Raised by an absentee alcoholic father, Jimmy joined a gang at 13 and was soon addicted to heroin.

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.desc: Assault from the Air introduces a third dimension to a battlefield. The program focuses on the key requirements in a Battleplan for Assault from the Air and the changes that technology has brought.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Mientras Teto se hace cargo del delicado estado de salud de Misael, Rafael se involucra cada vez más en la vida de Silvia, quien inevitablemente se enamora de él, poniendo en riesgo todo el futuro que su padre ya había asegurado.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: The team comes across a small village with a revered leader. Beckett soon becomes so enamored by his host he brings him to Atlantis. But soon, McKay discovers that Lucius is using some sort of pheromone to enchant those around him.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Exploring a village, the team is suddenly attacked and taken prisoner as Ronon had unknowingly lured the Wraith there. The villagers set Sheppard and Teyla free, who mobilize a strike force. When they return, the village has been devastated.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Dr. McKay discovers a reference to an abandoned Ancient testing site. At the site, the team discovers a vast metropolis supporting millions of Ancients. Eager to create an alliance, Weir is shocked when their leader Oberoth refuses the offer.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Waking up in a psychiatric hospital outside of D.C., Weir is shocked to discover that her entire experience in Atlantis over the last two years was all in her imagination. She learns that a car accident left her suffering from delusional psychosis.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Summoned to a planet by a communication code, the team is ambushed by Kolya, who has now created his own faction of Genii after being forced from the inner circle. While the rest of the team manages to escape, Sheppard is taken prisoner.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: McKay is called back to earth to convince his estranged sister, Jeannie Miller, to assist the Air Force. McKay and Jeannie travel to Atlantis and begin the experiment which is initially successful until a McKay from the parallel universe appears.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: While exploring a new planet, Lt. Scott is attacked by an aggressive plant-like creature that infects him. Scott's circumstances turn dire and Tamara must search for a way to stop the alien infection from spreading while more creatures move in.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Col. Young (Louis Ferreira) is plagued by a recurring vision wherein Destiny is attacked and destroyed by aliens. After placing the crew on high alert, he starts to feel that he may be losing his mind and questions his ability as the commander!

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: When Destiny comes upon a heavily damaged ship, Dr. Rush and Col. Young decide to make a dangerous space-suited expedition to the ship. But an unexpected turn of events leaves Dr. Rush and Col. Young stranded aboard the strange vessel.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Lucian Alliance prisoner Simeon escapes, creating a manhunt on a remote planet. But Homeworld Command orders he be captured alive, believing Simeon has valuable information. Simeon must be brought back to the Destiny before he kills or is killed.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A truce is declared among the Goa'uld, so that the warlords can attend a summit on the future of universe domination. As Jackson speaks fluent Goa'uld, he is sent to the summit disguised as an aide. But his real mission is to poison the delegates!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Embattled and under siege, SG-1 attempts to escape a Goa'uld search and destroy mission bent on finding them and the secret crystal they carry. Meanwhile, the balance of life is threatened by the reappearance of the evil System Lord Anubis.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As an asteroid hurtles toward Earth, SG-1 uses an abandoned Goa'uld ship as a launch pad for a mega-bomb designed to destroy the rock before impact. But when SGC loses the ship's signal, it's feared that the team is dead and that Earth is in peril.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Martín insulta a Carmela, ella y Malcolm se dan cuenta de que el abuelo es un obstáculo en su camino, Norma trata de abrirle los ojos a Gabriela. Rosario visita la hacienda y se pelea con Sara.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Hombres armados custodian la hacienda de los Reyes día y noche. Carmela sigue su plan y finge un desmayo para que despidan a Dominga, por quien surge una guerra entre Martín y Fernando.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley and Wednesday start a row at a party when their gift of a tarantula upsets Harold, the birthday boy. Harold's parents insist that the Addams children lack breeding and, therefore, are no longer allowed to play with their son.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers struggle to complete their creative detours before putting in a proper day's work in the fields, where they discover the key to potato farming is manure.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams are clowning around when they learn a traditional Russian circus act, but it's no joke when multiple teams make a critical error and misread a clue, jeopardizing their positions in the Race.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Following a huge mistake, one Racer makes an important decision that will impact their team beyond the finish line and for the rest of their lives.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Tension among the teams runs high when, for the first time ever, two teams are U-turned and have to complete an extra task, jeopardizing their chances of making it to the final four.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: After Racers become violently ill during a challenge, the stress of the Race finally catches up to one team as a Racer threatens to qui.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams travel to South Korea where they battle it out on water and ice to make the final three.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final three teams soar to new heights over Southern California, competing in the final leg for a shot at the million-dollar prize and, for two teams, the chance to become the first ever all-female team to win the series.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Eleven former Teams who fell short of winning the $1 million prize during their first Race around the globe will return for another shot.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams dressed as kangaroos continue through Australia where one Racer reverts to old habits as tempers start to flare, and another Team breaks down in tears from utter exhaustion.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While in Japan, one team's hopes are shattered after a car crash jolts them to the back of the pack, and Racers get down and dirty in a pile of frigid mud.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The nine remaining teams depart from Commodore Perry's Landing in Kurihama, Japan and travel to their next destination in a race around the world for one million dollars.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The pressure builds when a prehistoric Roadblock pushes one Racer over the edge and a Double U-turn causes panic among the teams as they race to avoid elimination.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by a swarming sea of people on the congested streets of India, one team narrowly dodges a traffic collision while another's clumsiness threatens to spoil their chances of acing the Detour.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the crowded streets of India, one team makes a costly blunder while another Racer takes a desperate plunge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder, at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their undoing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Fingerprinting: The identification Division of the FBI relies on fingerprints as one of the most effective ways to identify criminals.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In New York, an ambitious college student has her whole life ahead of her, until she crosses the path of a killer. It's a random murder, the hardest kind to solve.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For a price, anything's possible. Contract killings arose out of the need to establish the perfect alibi. By hiring someone else to do the dirty work, a person can deflect guilt, at least in theory.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.desc: A pair of newlyweds stopping in a small town are trapped by their own superstition when playing a fortune-telling machine in a local diner.

programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their 'perfect' home where they are waited on by mechanical servants.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl Dixon's arrival to France sets off a violent chain of events that inadvertently puts a young boy at the heart of a growing religious movement in danger; Daryl agrees to help shepherd the boy to safety in exchange for help returning to America.

programme.title: The Walking Dead: Daryl Dixon
programme.desc: Daryl, Isabelle, Laurent and Sylvie face trouble on the road; Isabelle remembers the day the hungry ones appeared; Laurent struggles to fit in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Saviors, ahora dirigidos por Simon, atacan Hilltop pese a que algunos de sus combatientes están dentro, presos. Maggie organiza la defensa del poblado pero, ¿podrán evitar una masacre como la que Simon perpetró contra el grupo de Jadis?

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Jadis planea una muerte horrenda para Negan. Mientras, Morgan va en busca de Henry y Rick sale de Hilltop para cazar a los que huyeron durante el asalto comandado por Simon. Finalmente, los dos se encuentran en territorio enemigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Mientras los hombres de Negan continúan con su ofensiva, Aaron sigue buscando aliados nuevos, pese a que pueda costarle la vida. Daryl y Rosita se enfrentan a un viejo amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades unen sus fuerzas en la última batalla contra los Salvadores. Negan ha conseguido entregar a Rick un mapa con instrucciones mapas, para así tenderle una emboscada.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y su grupo hacen un viaje arriesgado a Washington, D. C. para buscar los artefactos que necesitarán para construir la civilización que él y Carl imaginaron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Las comunidades se unen para restaurar un puente que facilite la comunicación y el comercio, pero alguien resulta gravemente herido. Además, varios Saviors han desaparecido.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una desaparición misteriosa pone en peligro los planes para el futuro de Rick y divide al grupo mientras construyen un puente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La visión de Rick de un futuro civilizado se ve amenazada por un cúmulo de traiciones y agravios pasados que nunca fueron vengados ni perdonados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se ve obligado a enfrentar el pasado en su intento por proteger a las comunidades y el futuro que Carl y él concibieron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Seis años después de la desaparición de Rick, un grupo recién llegado a Alexandria, liderados por la temperamental Magna, genera problemas a los habitantes de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene está solo y en peligro, perseguido por una horda de zombis que, aparentemente, hablan. Mientras tanto, Michonne guía al grupo de Magna hasta Hilltop, donde esperan ser aceptados como nuevos miembros de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Jesus y Aaron encuentran a Eugene, pero la horda de zombis parlantes los persigue incansablemente. Entretanto, en Alexandria, Negan escapa de su confinamiento porque a Gabriel se le olvida cerrar la puerta de su celda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl libera a Henry porque le estaba contando demasiadas cosas a Lydia y, después, interroga a la adolescente sobre su grupo. Entetanto, el grupo de Magna desobedece a Tara y se adentra por la noche en el bosque en busca de Luke.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger builds a high tunnel greenhouse. Richard explains the best types of pliers and wrenches. Scott converts recessed lights into pendants. And the guys ask WHAT IS IT?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps quiet a squealing shower. Kevin installs a DIY-friendly security and safety system. And the guys ask WHAT IS IT?

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger shows Kevin how to start plants from seed. Richard replaces an outdoor hose spigot with one that will never freeze. Tom builds a moveable kitchen island with Kevin.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger helps plant a low-cost, low-maintenance privacy screen. Tommy demonstrates many uses for a speed square. Richard uses new technology to seal ductwork from the inside.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard helps replace a shower valve that shuts off mysteriously. Tom shows how to patch a hole in baseboard. Roger shares some tips for maintaining a lawn mower. And the guys ask "What Is It?"

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: In this special program, the guys celebrate 300 episodes of "Ask This Old House" by looking back at some of their best moments and revealing some behind-the-scenes secrets.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a table from solid fir, Kevin stains and finishes it. Roger gets rid of tree stumps using a gas-powered stump grinder. Richard discusses the state of solar energy.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin helps make a home accessible for a homeowner in a wheelchair. Later, Tom and Kevin rebuild a dangerous staircase for a survivor of the Boston Marathon bombing.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott replaces outdated fluorescent undercabinet lights. Roger and Kevin demonstrate how to work with concrete. Richard teaches Tom about energy savings of temperature setbacks on thermostats.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin help a homeowner install new cabinets. Richard shows options for countertops. Kevin visits the Cleveland home and restaurant kitchens of Chef Michael Symon.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard shows Kevin solutions for rust stains. Tom installs a pass-through in a load-bearing wall. Roger replaces a fence gate. The guys ask "What Is It" with guest NASA Astronaut Rick Mastracchio.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger heads to Florida to learn about Citrus Greening, a disease that's killing citrus trees. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Tom replaces an old vinyl peel-and-stick floor with ceramic tile.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger educates Kevin on beneficial insects. Tom resizes a front door that gets stuck on the carpet every time it opens. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard repairs an outdoor garden faucet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Richard tour Lake Mead. Roger replaces a water-guzzling lawn. Meteorologist Jim Cantore shares cautionary tales from the front lines of drought. And Richard replaces an old-fashioned toilet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom repairs some structural problems in a home. Scott helps run wiring for a new switch and ceiling fixture. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Roger follows up on an insect problem.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a natural gas line for a new grill. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Roger shares tips on what grows best in the shade. Tom helps a homeowner hang a heavy, decorative mirror on masonry.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger learns from a beekeeper how to set up a beehive for a homeowner. The guys ask, "What is it?" and Scott adds lighting to a dark kitchen without having to run any new wiring.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger follows up with a beekeeper regarding honey harvesting. Then, Kevin, along with Roger, Richard, and Tom ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Electrician Scott Caron adds outlets to a homeowner's home.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger builds a hydroponic garden. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard installs a hot and cold water outdoor faucet. Tom explains the proper size screw to use when installing composite decking.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott connects a homeowner's basement lighting system to one switch. Richard shares tips on air conditioning maintenance. The guys ask "What Is It?" And Roger shows how to rejuvenate a crabapple tree.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a broken window with a safer solution. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard shows how to rotate a toilet. Roger teaches Kevin how to properly sharpen a chainsaw blade.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a watertight fire pit cover. Then Scott shows the evolution of fuses. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard heads to Missouri to upgrade and vent a bathroom sink.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom helps a homeowner install interior window trim. Richard shares some first time plumbing tips with Kevin. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Scott helps a homeowner wire an above ground pool safely.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard installs a whole house ductless heating and cooling system. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin shares tips on hearing protection. Tom helps a homeowner repair a sagging plaster ceiling.

programme.desc: Kevin transforms an old backsplash. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Richard installs a new kitchen faucet. Tom shows the options of insulation materials: Spray foam, fiberglass, and blown-in cellulose.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack Tripper, a chef for all seasons, turns out to be quite a dish himself when he disguises himself as roommate Chrissy to skirt FBI agents on his trail.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: It's no more "Mr. Nice Guy" after Jack learns how to get his way with Chrissy and Janet.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: The trio's outrageous escapades result in an eviction notice from Furley and they get ready to move into a luxurious rent-free penthouse.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: 75-year-young veteran actor J.Pat O'Malley takes a lesson from the "youngsters" by forming his own "oldster-trio" in a geriatric apartment commune.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Ralph Furley tries to impress his childhood rival by introducing Chrissy as his new bride.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: A letter to a lovelorn column convinces Chrissy and Janet that the other is having a love affair with Jack.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Jack faces eviction from the apartment when he inadvertently reveals to Furley his great passion for the opposite sex. Guest Star(s): Joanna Kerns

programme.desc: When the duck guys have to pull an all-nighter to finish some work, Willie decides he wants to join them. But when a dying smoke detector distracts them from their work, Jase and Willie head off to disarm it.

programme.title: Duck Dynasty

programme.title: Duck Dynasty
